name: public_safety_biometric_enrollment_marrowbridge_car_fair
premise: A Public Safety operations center is in a fast-moving incident involving public safety biometric enrollment marrowbridge car fair. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the next automated batch runs. Every delay increases life safety, public trust, and proportional action. Stakeholders are already framing this as care vs fairness under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Soren Bennett
agents.identity: I am Soren Bennett, accountable for a defensible call in Public Safety when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays fairness for care.

agents.name: Kaito Reed
agents.identity: I am Kaito Reed, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Public Safety.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so fairness isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of care.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect fairness.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to fairness to secure care under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the next automated batch runs. Evidence is partial. Soren Bennett must decide under care vs fairness. What does Soren Bennett do?
